summary: Iteration 2 verified: admin pricing CRUD (backend + UI), customer quote calculator driven by /api/pricing, quote-form rename to 'Client Details', quantity clamped 1-1000, optional photo upload (submit succeeds with no file), and end-to-end pricing propagation (admin set Laptops=15000 -> /quote live estimate immediately shows ₹14,250-₹15,750). All 24/24 pytest backend tests pass. All Playwright UI flows green.
critical_code_review_comments: Shadcn <Select> wrapper carries data-testid but Radix renders the testid on a hidden node; the visible SelectTrigger has no data-testid. Add data-testid to SelectTrigger (e.g. select-category-trigger-${idx}) to make the Category/Condition pickers reliably automatable. Live estimate already validates the underlying data so functionality is fine; this is purely a testability gap.

Backend POST /api/quotes accepts quantity beyond 1000 (e.g. 1000+ accepted in test) - frontend clamps client-side but the API has no Pydantic ge/le validation. Recommend adding Field(ge=1, le=1000) to AssetQuoteItem.quantity to prevent malicious/buggy clients bypassing the limit.
DELETE /api/pricing/admin/{id} hard-deletes the document; consider soft-delete (set active=false) for audit trail since admin valuation history can influence past quote rebuilds.
App.js still ~1649 lines after iteration 2 additions - split AdminView/QuoteView into separate modules; PricingRow already a sub-component, do the same for AdminAnalytics/QuoteSummary.

Pricing create/update has no name uniqueness check - admin can add duplicate 'Laptops' rows which would render two Laptops options in the quote dropdown. Add a uniqueness constraint or de-duplicate by case-insensitive name.
Pricing base_value has no validation - negative numbers and zero are currently accepted by POST/PATCH. Add Field(gt=0) to PricingCreate/PricingUpdate.base_value.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates and cleans up TEST_* quotes/contacts/pricing rows. UI test created 1 quote (TEST_UI_NoFileClient) and 1 pricing row (TEST_UI_PricingItem) - both cleaned up post-test. Laptops base_value temporarily set to 15000 during end-to-end propagation test; reverted to seeded 12000 on completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (24 cases, all green). New TestPricing class covers public list, admin auth gating, full CRUD and 404s; TestQuoteNoFile covers no-uploaded_files submission and qty=1000 boundary. Pricing collection has 9 seeded items via on_event('startup'); only seeded when collection is empty. Shadcn Selects don't expose data-testid on visible trigger - use input/text assertions or live-estimated-total to verify category selection in Playwright.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in iteration 2 review. All 4 requested changes (admin-managed pricing, qty clamp 1-1000, 'Client Details' rename, optional photo upload) are implemented correctly and propagate end-to-end. Backend POST /api/pricing/admin returns 401 unauthenticated and 200 with admin cookie; PATCH/DELETE return 404 for unknown ids. Quote API accepts uploaded_files=None or missing and stores []. Pricing rate changes are reflected in /api/pricing immediately and on the /quote page on next mount.
